description: Strategy-of-strategies: combined proven-alpha book. Reconstructs each engine's weekly net-of-cost excess-vs-SPY stream from justhodl-outcomes, builds correlation matrix, combines via equal/inverse-vol/risk-parity/max-Sharpe/HRP. Outputs Sharpe/Sortino/maxDD/Calmar/capacity + recommended HRP weights -> SSM /justhodl/calibration/strategy-weights. data/strategy-portfolio.json.
